originalTitle: RL Hyperparam Sweeps for 1M FPS mini-DoTA/LoL. Dev day #9
title: Fixing Hyperparameter Sweeps and Profiling Performance for Mini-DOTA Environment
summary: Debugged a sweep failure caused by a zero reward metric and replaced it with normalized reward. Profiled and optimized compute observations, fixed a tower indexing bug, and started a hyperparameter sweep.
